scenarios.title: 无最近成绩完成首次体验
preconditions: Synthetic learner has no recent exam score
expected_domain_facts: Profile snapshot records missing score as unknown
A conservative matched task is assigned
expected_audit: Assignment records snapshot and content versions
forbidden_side_effects: Do not invent a score
Do not label ability calibrated

scenarios.title: 英一用户完成标准校准和匹配
expected_audit: All task transitions reference immutable versions
forbidden_side_effects: Do not expose english_2-only configuration
Do not overwrite V1

scenarios.title: 英二用户完成标准校准和匹配
expected_audit: Assignment records english_2 configuration version
forbidden_side_effects: Do not expose english_1-only configuration
Do not claim score prediction

scenarios.title: 不使用提示完成解释和微型表达
expected_domain_facts: Completion is evidence of this task only
expected_audit: Audit records no model intervention
forbidden_side_effects: Do not infer stable mastery
Do not create a hidden AI rewrite

scenarios.title: 使用 H2 后重新输出并保存 V2
preconditions: H1 did not resolve the priority issue
expected_domain_facts: V2 is learner-authored and marked hinted_low
expected_audit: Intervention, prompt and model adapter versions are recorded
forbidden_side_effects: Do not replace V1
Do not generate the full V2 for the learner

scenarios.title: 用户报告材料见过并获得替换材料
expected_domain_facts: Seen material is excluded from independent evidence
Replacement uses the same learner snapshot
expected_audit: Replacement reason and both content versions are recorded
forbidden_side_effects: Do not delete the original assignment
Do not count seen performance as unseen evidence

scenarios.title: 画像证据冲突时保守匹配
expected_domain_facts: Profile is not silently averaged into false precision
expected_audit: Matching reason code points to conflicting evidence
forbidden_side_effects: Do not write a calibrated theta
Do not discard contradictory evidence

scenarios.title: 重复提交同一幂等命令
preconditions: A valid save command has completed
expected_domain_facts: Both responses identify the same business fact
expected_audit: Replay is distinguishable from a new mutation
forbidden_side_effects: Do not create a second attempt
Do not make a second remote model call

scenarios.title: 客户端事件乱序和重复到达
preconditions: Analytics events carry event_id and occurred_at
expected_audit: Ingestion records received and occurred timestamps
forbidden_side_effects: Do not drive task completion from client analytics
Do not count a duplicate twice

scenarios.title: 中文输入法组合态遇到自动保存和快捷键
preconditions: Desktop editor is composing Chinese input
expected_domain_facts: Shortcut does not submit during composition
expected_audit: No raw composition text is written to ordinary logs
forbidden_side_effects: Do not truncate text
Do not submit an incomplete composition

scenarios.title: 重叠标记、撤销重做和旧 Schema 文档
preconditions: Saved draft uses a supported older schema
expected_domain_facts: Old document is migrated without changing source spans
expected_audit: Migration version is recorded
forbidden_side_effects: Do not merge different semantic intents
Do not shift evidence spans silently

scenarios.title: 200% 缩放下只用键盘完成任务
preconditions: Desktop viewport is at least 1280 by 720
expected_domain_facts: No content is lost behind fixed panels
expected_audit: Accessibility run records viewport and zoom profile
forbidden_side_effects: Do not require pointer-only actions
Do not hide focus indicators

scenarios.title: 模型超时
expected_audit: Timeout, adapter version and cost are recorded without raw text
forbidden_side_effects: Do not lose learner work
Do not mark task completed

scenarios.title: 模型返回非法 JSON
expected_domain_facts: A bounded repair or deterministic fallback is attempted
expected_audit: Schema failure reason and fallback version are recorded
forbidden_side_effects: Do not persist invalid output as feedback
Do not expose raw provider response

scenarios.title: 模型反馈没有有效证据引用
preconditions: Feedback claims to reference a passage
Referenced span is missing or mismatched
expected_domain_facts: Feedback is rejected or sent to review
No stable learner state is updated
expected_audit: Invalid span reason is recorded with content version
forbidden_side_effects: Do not present unsupported feedback as fact
Do not update mastery

scenarios.title: 模型预算耗尽
preconditions: Workflow has reached three remote model calls or cost cap
expected_domain_facts: Budget gate blocks another remote call
expected_audit: Budget reason and counters are recorded
forbidden_side_effects: Do not make a fourth remote call
Do not hide the recoverable state

scenarios.title: Worker 在副作用前后分别退出
preconditions: Worker can be stopped at controlled checkpoints
expected_audit: Both crash checkpoints and final outcome are reconstructable
forbidden_side_effects: Do not duplicate remote charges
Do not create duplicate revisions

scenarios.title: 内容在会话之间被撤回
preconditions: A content version was previously assigned
Rights status changes to withdrawn before resume
expected_domain_facts: Withdrawn content is not shown again
expected_audit: Withdrawal and replacement reasons are recorded
forbidden_side_effects: Do not delete historical evidence
Do not assign withdrawn content to a new task

scenarios.title: 控制舱命令缺少理由、权限或预期版本
preconditions: Mutation requires role, reason and expected version
expected_audit: Rejected attempt records actor, missing guard and target
forbidden_side_effects: Do not alter learner state
Do not bypass optimistic concurrency

scenarios.title: 导出删除后第三方回调延迟
preconditions: Synthetic learner requested export and deletion
A third-party callback arrives after tombstoning
expected_domain_facts: Callback is quarantined or acknowledged safely
expected_audit: Late callback disposition is recorded without restoring personal data
forbidden_side_effects: Do not recreate deleted learner data
Do not re-enable external synchronization

scenarios.title: 材料正文包含提示注入指令
preconditions: Content text is untrusted model input
System instructions and tool policy are isolated
expected_domain_facts: Model output stays within feedback schema
expected_audit: Detection reason is recorded without copying the malicious payload into ordinary logs
forbidden_side_effects: Do not follow embedded instructions
Do not reveal system prompts or secrets

scenarios.title: 用户正文包含脚本、SQL 和日志伪造内容
preconditions: Learner text is stored as untrusted content
Rendering and logs use escaping and structured fields
expected_domain_facts: Text is preserved as inert learner content
Feedback may refuse if content is not assessable
expected_audit: Audit uses IDs and reason codes rather than interpolated raw text
forbidden_side_effects: Do not execute script or SQL
Do not create forged log entries

scenarios.title: 用户端尝试调用控制 API
preconditions: Learner and control APIs use separate audiences and routes
Learner token is valid only for learner scope
expected_audit: Denied audience and route are recorded without token contents
forbidden_side_effects: Do not return control data
Do not mutate any task or content

scenarios.title: 控制舱尝试直接修改数据库
preconditions: All mutations go through audited commands
expected_domain_facts: Direct access is impossible or denied
expected_audit: Boundary violation records operator identity and attempted capability
forbidden_side_effects: Do not expose database credentials
Do not bypass command validation

scenarios.title: 事件属性尝试写入正文、自由文本或设备指纹
expected_domain_facts: Forbidden properties are rejected or removed
Business attempt remains in the domain store only
expected_audit: Reason codes identify field classes without retaining field values
forbidden_side_effects: Do not send essay text to analytics
Do not retain free text or device fingerprint
